column1: Methodology: Only official VGHF Posts, not replies to bsky users, yes replies to self (threads), went into threads whenever Bsky made it obvious (bsky seems to bury the ends of threads after 10 posts), does not account for times when VGHF self-reposts, any Events are considered Projects, includes QRPs but not RPs (most impactful for Vintage Mag Subscription), Subject Hierarchy: Project>Call To Action>Others>Collection (Posts with Patreon links were not added to Patreon count, for example). If something is labeled "from the X Papers" it has its own Collection line unless it was part of the original Project's release window
